testcase.name: shouldDetectDuplicateEvents
testcase.system-out:
15:00:55.872 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.kafkaeventdriven.domain.infrastructure.kafka.IdempotencyServiceIT]: IdempotencyServiceIT does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:00:55.994 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.kafkaeventdriven.domain.DomainApplication for test class com.kafkaeventdriven.domain.infrastructure.kafka.IdempotencyServiceIT

[domain-service] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-04-23T15:00:59.769+01:00 INFO 12420 --- [domain-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists domain.customers cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists domain.order_items cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists domain.orders cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists domain.processed_events cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists domain.products cascade Hibernate: create table domain.customers ( created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, id uuid not null, phone varchar(20), name varchar(150) not null, email varchar(255) not null unique, address jsonb, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table domain.order_items ( quantity integer not null, subtotal numeric(38,2), unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, id uuid not null, order_id uuid not null, product_id uuid not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table domain.orders ( total_amount numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone not null, customer_id uuid not null, id uuid not null, notes TEXT, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','CONFIRMED','VALIDATED','CANCELLED','PAID','SHIPPED')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table domain.processed_events ( processed_at timestamp(6) with time zone, event_id uuid not null, event_type varchar(255), primary key (event_id) ) Hibernate: create table domain.products ( price numeric(38,2), stock integer, created_at timestamp(6) with time zone, updated_at timestamp(6) with time zone, id uuid not null, category varchar(255), description varchar(255), name varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('ACTIVE','INACTIVE','OUT_OF_STOCK')), primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists domain.order_items add constraint FKbioxgbv59vetrxe0ejfubep1w foreign key (order_id) references domain.orders Hibernate: alter table if exists domain.order_items add constraint FKocimc7dtr037rh4ls4l95nlfi foreign key (product_id) references domain.products Hibernate: alter table if exists domain.orders add constraint FKpxtb8awmi0dk6smoh2vp1litg foreign key (customer_id) references domain.customers 2026-04-23T15:00:59.864+01:00 testcase.name: shouldNotFailWhenMarkingAsProcessedTwice

Hibernate: select count(*) from domain.processed_events pe1_0 where pe1_0.event_id=?
